basic_details.organization_name: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES)
basic_details.short_information: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 3 DGM Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for engineering jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 41 Years Age Relaxation: SC/ST Category: 5 years OBC-NCL Category: 3 years J&K Domicile: 5 years Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD): 10 Years RITES regular/contract employees: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Full time bachelor’s degree in civil engineering
qualification.details: DGM (Civil- Tunnel Construction Expert) Full time bachelor's degree in civil engineering 11 Years post-qualification experience in the field of Tunnel Construction supervision and Management DGM (Transport Economist) Full time bachelor's degree in civil engineering (4 Years) / Full time B. Arch Architecture (5 Years) / Full time B Planning - (4 Years) AND Master's degree in economics / Statistics / Management (Finance) / Transport Engineering/ Transport Planning/ Transport Economics/ Traffic Engineering or equivalent 11 Years post-qualification experience in Traffic & Transport studies (with 11 years' experience in consultancy assignments) including transportation plans, transport economics, transport management, Comprehensive Mobility Plans, Mass Transit Studies, Transport Planning, Economic & Financial Analysis and well versed in professional consulting requirements along with knowledge of suitable IT-database handling & analysis skills using computer software. DGM (Civil-Marine Structural Expert) Full time bachelor's degree in civil engineering AND Post graduation in Marine Structures or Coastal Engineering or Ocean Engineering or equivalent Minimum experience of 11 years out of which 07 years' of experience in design and construction of marine structures including breakwater, revetment/ shore protection works, dredging and reclamation, berths, piling, etc.

salary_details.details: Approximate emoluments at the minimum of the pay-scale is INR 70,000-2,00,000

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RITES to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.rail_india_technical_and_economic_servic: Full time bachelor’s degree in civil engineering

content_sections.heading: RITES Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RITES Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RITES Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: DGM (Civil- Tunnel Construction Expert) Full time bachelor's degree in civil engineering 11 Years post-qualification experience in the field of Tunnel Construction supervision and Management DGM (Transport Economist) Full time bachelor's degree in civil engineering (4 Years) / Full time B. Arch Architecture (5 Years) / Full time B Planning - (4 Years) AND Master's degree in economics / Statistics / Management (Finance) / Transport Engineering/ Transport Planning/ Transport Economics/ Traffic Engineering or equivalent 11 Years post-qualification experience in Traffic & Transport studies (with 11 years' experience in consultancy assignments) including transportation plans, transport economics, transport management, Comprehensive Mobility Plans, Mass Transit Studies, Transport Planning, Economic & Financial Analysis and well versed in professional consulting requirements along with knowledge of suitable IT-database handling & analysis skills using computer software. DGM (Civil-Marine Structural Expert) Full time bachelor's degree in civil engineering AND Post graduation in Marine Structures or Coastal Engineering or Ocean Engineering or equivalent Minimum experience of 11 years out of which 07 years' of experience in design and construction of marine structures including breakwater, revetment/ shore protection works, dredging and reclamation, berths, piling, etc.

content_sections.heading: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 41 Years Age Relaxation: SC/ST Category: 5 years OBC-NCL Category: 3 years J&K Domicile: 5 years Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD): 10 Years RITES regular/contract employees: 5 years

content_sections.heading: RITES Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Approximate emoluments at the minimum of the pay-scale is INR 70,000-2,00,000

rows.event: Commencement of submission of online application and online payment of fees
Last date of submission of online application and online payment of fees

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RITES to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RITES DGM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications and payment of fees is 22nd July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the DGM post in RITES?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the DGM post in RITES, distributed across different specializations as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the DGM (Transport Economist) post?
faq.answer: For the DGM (Transport Economist) post, a full-time bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, B. Arch Architecture, or B. Planning is required, along with a Master's degree in economics, statistics, management, transport engineering, or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to RITES DGM posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all DGM posts is 41 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for RITES DGM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 600/- plus applicable taxes for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 300/- plus applicable taxes for EWS/SC/ST/PWD candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for RITES DGM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Scrutiny followed by an Interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the DGM post at RITES?
faq.answer: The approximate emoluments at the minimum of the pay-scale for the DGM post range from INR 70,000 to INR 2,00,000.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for the DGM (Civil- Tunnel Construction Expert) post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates applying for the DGM (Civil- Tunnel Construction Expert) post must have 11 years of post-qualification experience in the field of Tunnel Construction supervision and Management.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside India apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the application is for posts across India. International candidates should check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official RITES DGM Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official RITES website for the notification.
